backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend canister with user profile management, crypto asset types (capital flows, projections, regional flows, institutional alerts), and access-controlled query/update methods using a mixin authorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single PWA 'Install App' button feature to its affected files (App.tsx, Header.tsx) and associated components, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted catalog of short summaries for all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, hook, service, and config file.
frontend/ANDROID_APK_BUILD_GUIDE.md: Portuguese-language guide explaining how to package the crypto dashboard as a native Android APK using Capacitor, listing prerequisites like Node.js, Android Studio, and Java JDK.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines light and dark mode CSS custom properties for the design system using OKLCH color values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with PWA meta tags, manifest link, apple-touch-icon references, iOS splash screen link, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest defining app name, icons at multiple sizes (192, 256, 512px) with maskable variants, standalone display mode, and desktop/mobile screenshots.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that lazy-loads four tab surfaces (BubbleVisualization, CapitalFlow, ConfluenceZones, FuturesMonitor) with Suspense, manages active module state, and wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers.
frontend/src/components/BinanceCredentia: UI panel for entering, saving, removing, and testing Binance API credentials, with security notices and status indicators using shadcn Card/Input/Button components.
frontend/src/components/BubbleDetailPane: A slide-in detail panel component that displays enriched asset information (price, trend, convergence score, chart) for a selected bubble, with animated entrance and a backdrop overlay.
frontend/src/components/BubbleVisualizat: A 3D visualization component using React Three Fiber that renders interactive floating bubbles for high-convergence assets, with an overlay detail panel on bubble selection.
Displays detected confluence zones sorted by intensity, falling back to synthetic zones generated from live Binance data when the backend returns no results.
frontend/src/components/FloatingBubble.t: A 3D sphere mesh component rendered in Three.js that animates with organic floating motion, hover scaling, and visual properties (color, glow, emissive) derived from asset convergence data.
frontend/src/components/FlowVisualizatio: Visualizes capital flow data between assets, generating synthetic flows from live Binance data as a fallback and deriving an interpretation summary (e.g., 'Capital migrando para BTC') from flow intensities.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A simple footer component displaying a copyright notice, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a live data status indicator.
frontend/src/components/FuturesDashboard: Dashboard component for Binance Futures that displays account overview, open positions, and a refresh control, requiring valid API credentials to render data.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with logo, live WebSocket connection status indicator, and navigation buttons for switching between the four main modules (Convergência, Fluxo de Capital, Zonas Técnicas, Order Flow).
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/OpenPositionsTab: Renders a card-based grid of open Binance Futures positions with formatted price/PnL data, leverage badges, market-type labels, and per-position risk insights/warnings.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Alert: A scrollable panel displaying order flow alerts with severity-based styling, a count badge, and a clear-all button.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Confl: A scrollable panel displaying detected order book confluence events with direction icons and severity badges, styled distinctly from alerts.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Order: A compact controls bar component for the Order Flow Monitor that renders market selection buttons (Futures/Spot), a polling toggle switch, last-updated badge, refresh button, and settings button.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/order: Centralized constant object containing all English UI strings used throughout the Order Flow Monitor, including labels, messages, error text, and a helper function for alert count formatting.
frontend/src/components/order-flow/Order: A reusable Card-based section wrapper for the Order Flow Monitor that displays a title with an optional icon and badge alongside arbitrary child content.
A responsive grid component that renders a list of labeled stat items with optional icons in 2, 3, or 4 columns depending on the `columns` prop.
frontend/src/components/OrderFlowErrorBo: React class-based error boundary for the Order Flow Monitor that catches runtime errors and displays a styled fallback UI with retry and page-reload actions.
frontend/src/components/OrderFlowMonitor: Real-time BTC order flow analysis component that polls Binance REST data, classifies trades, detects confluence events and alerts, and renders stats, controls, alerts, and confluence panels with configurable thresholds persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for first-time user profile setup, collecting name and optional email, then saving via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallButton: A button component that handles PWA installation across iOS, Android, and desktop platforms, showing platform-specific install dialogs or triggering the native browser install prompt.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: A bottom-banner prompt component that detects PWA installability and shows platform-specific installation instructions, with dismissal logic using localStorage to suppress re-display for 3 days.
frontend/src/components/TrendChart.tsx: An area chart component using Recharts that displays OHLC price data for a given symbol, with trend-based color coding and a custom tooltip showing open/high/low/close values.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAssetDetailData.ts: A React Query hook that fetches capital flow, confluence zone, and live Binance market data for a given asset, combining backend actor calls with cached WebSocket data.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceData.ts: A hook that manages a Binance WebSocket connection for live ticker data with a REST API fallback polling mechanism, maintaining a module-level cache of market data across remounts.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceFuturesMoni: A collection of React Query hooks and mutations for managing Binance API credentials (add, remove, test) and user profile (get, save) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceHistoricalD: A React Query hook that fetches historical candlestick (kline) data from Binance for a given symbol and interval, with retry logic and a 5-minute stale time.
frontend/src/hooks/useBinanceOrderFlow.t: React hook that polls Binance public market data (24h ticker, recent trades, book ticker) at a configurable interval, using fingerprint comparison to avoid unnecessary state updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useBubbleAssets.ts: React Query hook that fetches bubble assets from the backend actor and enriches them with live Binance price/volume data, falling back to synthetic bubbles derived from market movers when no backend data exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useOpenFuturesPositio: React Query hook that fetches open futures positions from the backend actor, requiring authentication and Binance credentials, with optional polling every 10 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useOrderFlowStableMem: Hook that provides ref-based mutable memory (previous spread, stats, price, rolling averages) for the Order Flow Monitor without triggering React re-renders.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAUpdateToast.ts: Hook that checks for PWA service worker updates on mount and periodically, showing a persistent toast notification with an option to activate the update.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks (capital flows, confluence zones, recovery assets, regional data) that fetch data from the backend actor and enrich it with live Binance market data.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendChartData.ts: Hook that fetches 4-hour Binance historical kline data for a symbol and transforms it into chart-ready data points with formatted date strings.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines a dark neon-themed design system with custom CSS variables, utility classes for terminal panels, neon glows, and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/lib/binanceDomains.ts: Centralizes and exports base URL constants for Binance Spot REST, Futures REST, and Futures WebSocket endpoints used for public market data access.
frontend/src/lib/binanceHistoricalServic: Fetches historical candlestick (kline) data from the Binance public REST API, with a retry wrapper using exponential backoff.
frontend/src/lib/binanceOrderFlowRest.ts: Provides typed REST client functions to fetch public Binance market data including 24h ticker, recent trades, and book ticker for both spot and futures markets.
frontend/src/lib/binanceService.ts: Implements a Binance WebSocket client for real-time public market data streaming with a REST fallback, a module-level cache, and a utility to fetch prices for multiple symbols.
frontend/src/lib/bookConfluence.ts: Analyzes order book dynamics to detect confluence events where trade flow imbalance aligns with bid/ask spread movements, classifying them by direction and severity.
frontend/src/lib/bubbleLayout.ts: Calculates deterministic 3D spherical positions and animation parameters (speed, amplitude, phase) for bubble UI elements using a golden-ratio distribution and string hashing.
frontend/src/lib/bubbleVisualMapping.ts: Provides utility functions to map convergence/trend data to 3D bubble visual properties including size, color, glow intensity, and hover states for a market visualization UI.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Exports number formatting utilities for Portuguese (pt-BR) locale, including currency, percentage, compact (K/M/B), and two-decimal rounding helpers.
frontend/src/lib/futuresPositionFormat.t: Provides formatting and color-coding helpers for Binance futures position data, including price, size, leverage, PnL, liquidation price, and market type badge styling.
frontend/src/lib/orderFlowAlerts.ts: Implements an order flow alert system that generates proxy alerts for liquidation events, volume spikes, and spread anomalies based on rolling window stats and configurable thresholds.
frontend/src/lib/orderFlowAnalysis.ts: Provides order flow analysis utilities including trade classification by aggressor side, rolling window statistics calculation, and large trade cluster detection.
frontend/src/lib/orderFlowFingerprint.ts: Generates and compares lightweight fingerprints from order flow data (ticker, book, recent trade IDs) to detect meaningful changes and avoid unnecessary UI re-renders.
frontend/src/lib/positionInsights.ts: Generates actionable insights for futures positions by analyzing PnL percentage, liquidation proximity, and entry-to-mark distance, with severity-based color and icon helpers.
frontend/src/lib/projections.ts: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/lib/pwaUtils.ts: Provides PWA utility functions for managing installation prompts, checking device/context types, detecting standalone mode, and handling service worker updates.
frontend/src/lib/symbols.ts: Defines a whitelist of supported Binance trading symbols and a helper function to normalize and match symbol strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/service-worker.ts: Service worker implementing cache-first, network-first, and network-only strategies for offline PWA support, with precaching of static assets and cleanup of old caches.
frontend/src/surfaces/BubbleVisualizatio: Tab surface that lazy-loads a 3D bubble visualization component, displaying capital convergence assets with live market status and alerts for offline or synthetic data states.
frontend/src/surfaces/CapitalFlowTabSurf: Simple tab surface wrapper that renders the FlowVisualization component.
frontend/src/surfaces/ConfluenceZonesTab: Simple tab surface wrapper that renders the ConfluenceZones component.
frontend/src/surfaces/FuturesMonitorTabS: Tab surface that sets up its own QueryClient and ThemeProvider context to render the OrderFlowMonitor with an error boundary, header, and footer.
frontend/src/utils/safeJson.ts: Provides safe JSON parsing and validation utilities for localStorage-backed settings, with typed validators for order flow, confluence, and alert thresholds.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, content paths, custom neon color palette, border radius, accordion animations, and safelisted neon utility classes. Includes plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Tracks project state for 'Crypto Confluence Bubbles', recording existing features (PWA install button) and a pending new feature request to add a PWA installation prompt button to the app UI.
